name: Bifenthrin 10% EC
description: BIFENTOR 10 Is A Contact And Stomach Insecticide Containing Bifenthrin 10% EC. It Provides Fast Knockdown Of A Wide Range Of Insect Pests And Offers Long Residual Control To Protect Crops From Severe Infestations.
crop: Cotton, Chilli, Vegetables & Other Field Crops
